overall.description: Aerial panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing towering mega-buildings, elevated highway interchanges, and a distant roller coaster structure. The camera slowly pans across the scene bathed in warm morning sunlight with slight atmospheric haze, revealing dense futuristic urban architecture without visible pedestrian or vehicle activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated aerial view of futuristic downtown highway interchange

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the camera right across the cyberpunk cityscape from an elevated vantage point to showcase the urban architecture

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with green neon accents and industrial metal facade dominating the left side
multi-level highway system with curved ramps and overpasses running through the city center
large steel roller coaster framework visible in the distance against the hazy skyline
low-rise building with flat roof and glass facade situated between the highway and distant structures
large glowing digital advertisement screen mounted on the side of a building

segments.scene_description: A sweeping elevated view of a futuristic cyberpunk city bathed in warm morning sunlight. The camera slowly pans right across towering mega-structures with neon accents, elevated highway interchanges, and a distant roller coaster, showcasing the dense urban architecture of a game environment without any visible pedestrian or vehicle activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a sweeping aerial pan across a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape bathed in the warm, hazy glow of morning sunlight. It begins with a wide view of towering mega-structures accented by neon lights, moving steadily to the right to reveal the intricate layers of the urban environment. As the camera glides, the perspective expands to encompass complex elevated highway interchanges and the skeletal frame of a distant roller coaster. The scene finally settles on the dense, silent architecture of the city, emphasizing a vast, uninhabited scale under the golden light.
